article.title: Offer Comparison Microsoft vs Uber
article.content:
Microsoft L62

Base: 35L
Performance Bonus: 3.5L (10%)
Joining Bonus: 6L (Year 1)
Stocks: $95K (~21L Year 1)

CTC Year 1: ~65L

Uber L4

Base: 46L
Performance Bonus: 7.5L
Joining Bonus: 6L (Year 1)
Stocks: $58K (~13L Year 1)
CTC Year 1: ~72L

Yoe: 4
Current CTC: 35L

What I’m looking for:

1.⁠ ⁠Chill work environment
2.⁠ ⁠Internal job postings abroad
3.⁠ ⁠⁠Easy-going RTO policies

Would love to hear your thoughts or experiences with Microsoft and Uber

post.content: is the offer a negotiated offer with Microsoft? also are you a 2021 passout?\n\nAlso, did you negotiate for L62 or they gave L62 in the beginning?
Whats the current base salary ? Also how to they check the counter offer do they check physical copy ?\n
MS L62 base can be more (ask for 42). But given your YoE L62 + 35 base is a very good offer.\nAlso they gave you L62 initially or after negotiations? (considering 4 YoE.)

Try to find team first to know about WLB.

In general in Uber you will have moderate to bad WLB.
in case of msft don't join azure/cloud related team most of them have worse WLB.

How did you get interviews. Is this some internal referral or directly applied on careers portal. ?
